Security Protocol

As Cyber Threats Accelerate, Human Awareness Remains the Critical Weakness

Despite multi-billion dollar investments in firewall technology and AI-driven defense systems, the human factor remains the most exploited link in the security chain. Real-world awareness is the front line.

Hardware Security

The Twelve Lords Cyber Cable. Total control over your data.

We've engineered security at the physical layer. Our Cyber Cable ensures your devices remain protected from modern attack vectors while delivering peak performance.

Secure Charging Mode
Hardware-enforced protection that prevents juice jacking and unauthorized data access.
User Control Button
A physical toggle that puts you in complete control of your device's data pathways.
Guard Against Attacks
Defends against HID injection and data interception at the physical layer.
